name: Nintendo Wii — Multi-Sided Platform (gamers + game developers)
description: BMG's second paradigm case for the Multi-Sided Platforms pattern. Two BMCs from each side's perspective: gamers (subsidised hardware, casual / family audience that PS3 and Xbox 360 ignored) and game developers (paid licensing fees, higher than digital-distribution alternatives, in exchange for access to the new audience the Wii had unlocked).
